description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java (48%), along with Markdown (16%) and Other (35%). The JSON does not list any public GitHub commits, repos, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
